sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6717" key="a)naklasmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακλᾰ-σμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg036:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:12:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.12.1</biblScope></bibl>. <sense n="II" id="n6717.0" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> in metre, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">overlapping,</tr_> cf. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀνακλάω</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:11:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>, Sch. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
